name: golang-github-fogleman-gg-dev
title: golang-github-fogleman-gg-dev
summary: Go Graphics - 2D rendering in Go with a simple API
description:
Go Graphics - 2D rendering in Go with a simple API
Go Graphics gg is a library for rendering 2D graphics in pure Go.
It is featuring a rich set of drawing, text, color, stroke & fill,
gradients & patterns, transformation, stack and clipping functions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-fogleman-gg-dev because Go Graphics - 2D rendering in Go with a simple API.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-fogleman-gg-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-fogleman-gg-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-fogleman-gg-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
